scripts.dev:services: concurrently "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:gateway" "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:auth" "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:products" "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:orders" "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:users"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter gateway-service build && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter auth-service build && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter product-service build && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter orders-service build && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter user-service build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter gateway-service test && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter auth-service test && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter product-service test && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter orders-service test && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 --filter user-service test
